name: ESM2
description: Mask residues in protein to predict likely sequence using ESM2 650M parameter language model. Scan protein for every position/AA pair's likelihood.
capabilities: Mask residues in protein to predict likely sequence using ESM2 650M parameter language model
Scan protein for every position/AA pair's likelihood

sequence.description: Protein amino acid sequence for residue masking and likelihood scanning using ESM2 650M model

mask_positions.description: Specific residue positions to mask for prediction (comma-separated), or leave empty to scan all positions
